subject: [PATCH 3/6] nfsd: fix nfsd_file leak on inter-server COPY setup failure

2026-05-31.patch_summary: This patch fixes a memory leak in the NFS server (nfsd) caused by failed inter-server COPY operations. When nfsd4_setup_inter_ssc() fails, it directly returns an error code without releasing the reference to the nf_dst object, leading to a file leak. The fix involves setting the status and jumping to the out label instead of returning directly, ensuring that the reference is properly released.
